author: jamescvermont-cyber
description: Two Truths and a Lie party game. Players submit 2 truths and 1 lie via a modal; everyone else votes on which is the lie. Correct guessers earn points. Tiebreaker extra innings up to 5 rounds.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store end user data.
name: TwoTruthsLie
short: Two Truths and a Lie party game with voting
